dimensions.overall_width_without_console: TR-110: 15 ft 9 in / TR-120: 18 ft 6 in
dimensions.overall_length: TR-110: 49 ft 6 in / TR-120: 59 ft 6 in
dimensions.width_clearance_between_posts: TR-110: 11 ft 2¾ in / TR-120: 13 ft 11¾ in
dimensions.maximum_vehicle_wheelbase: TR-110: 27 ft approx / TR-120: 37 ft approx
dimensions.suggested_bay_size: 20 ft width x 60 ft depth x 20 ft height

features: Four post design for heavy truck lifting
Manual override controls for power loss situations
Control console with multiple indicator lights
safety_features: Air lock system preventing lowering without air pressure
Park button with illuminated yellow light
Manual lowering valves for emergency use
maintenance: Daily: Pre-operation check list, clean and lubricate moving parts
Weekly: Clean cylinder wiper seals, verify fluid level (Dexron III)
Monthly: Inspect hydraulic components, tighten fasteners, clean chains
Annually: Replace hydraulic fluid, replace/clean filter, inspect bearings
notes: Minimum concrete floor: 8 inches thick, 4000 PSI, 28 days aged
Must be installed by licensed electrician and registered within 30 days
Never use impact tools to tighten anchor bolts - use torque wrench only
Unit must not be anchored until fully assembled and tested
Read manual thoroughly before installation, operation, or maintenance
